title: Generate random sensitivity values for each device

requirements.text: Replace the static sensitivity values (General: 176, Red Dot: 98, 2x: 190, 4x: 190) with randomly generated values. Generate a new random set of sensitivity values each time the Generate button is clicked. The random values should be within sensible gaming sensitivity ranges: General (50-200), Red Dot (50-150), 2x (100-250), 4x (100-250).

quotes: dont give the given sensitivity, generate random sensitivity for every device

acceptanceCriteria: Each device name generates a unique set of random sensitivity values
Values are generated within the specified ranges for each sensitivity type
The popup displays the randomly generated values instead of static ones
Clicking Generate multiple times produces different random values each time

constraints: Do not modify the passkey authentication flow
Do not change the black and red theme styling
Keep the instant popup display without loading states
nonGoals: Remembering previously generated values for devices
Adding user accounts or authentication beyond the passkey
